2232900.name: Sisters of Sodomorrah
2232900.description:
Game Overview

A visual novel telling the story of the fabled city of Sodomorrah, where one hundred and eleven maidens were sent in isolation to not tempt mankind with their incredible, divine beauty. What secrets hide behind this elusive gem in the desert that they call home?


Plot Synopsis

A pilgrim has travels to Sodomorrah in order to experience a Test of Faith to become a monk of the Holy See, proving himself to God and the Church. Inside the Ivory-white walls of Sodomorrah lies not only his trial, but also further mysteries when he meets the likes of Adelina and the sisters of Sodomorrah.




  • DISCOVER: The inhabitants of Sodomorrah are a curious sort, full of surprises
  • EXPERIENCE: The desert is a hostile place, but can also be wonderous
  • APPRECIATE: High quality illustrations inspired by religious Renaissance-era artwork
